description: Is anyone trying to walk off with customer data? Read top-to-bottom: headline counts → leaderboard of likely exfilters → drill into one person → live Loki stream of the offending lines. Hover the ℹ icon on any panel for details.

options.content:
# AI o11y — Data Theft (per-employee exfil)

**Story:** Is anyone trying to walk off with customer data? Read top-to-bottom: headline counts (24h) -> top-10 likely exfilters (10m rolling) -> drill into one person -> live Loki stream of the actual log lines.

**Look for:** any non-zero value in the **🚨 Total exfil-keyword events** or **🔒 Credit-card pastes** stat. If you see >1 employee in the leaderboard pulling away from the pack, that's your prime suspect.

panels.title: 🚨 Headline — is anyone exfiltrating right now?

panels.description: Count of LLM-gateway log lines in the last hour mentioning exfil-flavoured keywords (export, dump, customer list, SSN, etc.). Treat as a noise-floor sanity check — leaderboard below tells you WHO. Populates within ~5 min after probes fire keyword-matching traffic.
panels.title: 🚨 Total exfil-keyword events — last 1h

panels.description: Distinct employees who triggered at least one exfil-keyword event in the last hour. 0 = nobody is currently fishing; >1 = open the leaderboard and find them.

targets.expr: count(sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(export|download|copy|paste|dump|extract|forward|email me|send me|give me|leak|exfil|steal|theft|secret|password|database|customer.*list|user.*data|cc|credit card|ssn|api[ -]?key|salary|hr.*data)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~".*@.*" [1h])) > 0)

panels.title: 👤 How many employees are exfiltrating? (1h)

panels.description: Hits on credit-card-number regex (cc_paste) in the LLM gateway in the last hour. Any non-zero value is worth a look — somebody pasted a card.
panels.title: 🔒 Credit-card pastes detected (1h)

panels.description: Current state of the data_theft alert rule. Fires when any single employee triggers ≥5 exfil events in a 10-minute window.
panels.title: ⚠ data_theft alert — is it firing?

panels.description: Top 10 employees ranked by exfil-keyword event count over the last 10 minutes. The bar at the top is the current prime suspect — Tim Heidecker's malicious-insider archetype usually parks here.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(export|download|copy|paste|dump|extract|forward|email me|send me|give me|leak|exfil|steal|theft|secret|password|database|customer.*list|user.*data|cc|credit card|ssn|api[ -]?key|salary|hr.*data)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~".*@.*" [10m])))

panels.title: 🔥 Top 10 likely exfilters right now (10m rolling)

panels.description: Time series of exfil-keyword events per employee (top 10, 5m window). Use this to spot whether someone spiked once or is steadily grazing.

targets.expr: topk(10, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(export|download|copy|paste|dump|extract|forward|email me|send me|give me|leak|exfil|steal|theft|secret|password|database|customer.*list|user.*data|cc|credit card|ssn|api[ -]?key|salary|hr.*data)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~".*@.*" [5m])))

panels.title: 📈 Exfil events over time — top 10 employees
🔎 Drill into one employee — what is $persona_id doing?

panels.description: Two lines for the employee picked in the Employee dropdown: exfil-keyword count (10m window, red zone at ≥5) vs total gateway events (5m). Big gap between them = focused fishing; lines move together = chatty user.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(export|download|copy|paste|dump|extract|forward|email me|send me|give me|leak|exfil|steal|theft|secret|password|database|customer.*list|user.*data|cc|credit card|ssn|api[ -]?key|salary|hr.*data)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id="$persona_id" [10m]))

panels.title: 📈 $persona_id — exfil score vs total events over time

panels.description: Exfil-keyword event count for the selected employee in the last 10 minutes. Red at ≥5 — same threshold the data_theft alert uses.

targets.expr: sum(count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(export|download|copy|paste|dump|extract|forward|email me|send me|give me|leak|exfil|steal|theft|secret|password|database|customer.*list|user.*data|cc|credit card|ssn|api[ -]?key|salary|hr.*data)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id="$persona_id" [10m]))

panels.title: 🚨 $persona_id — exfil events in last 10m
🔥 Top exfilters table — exfil count + cc-paste breakdown

panels.description: Top 20 employees in the last hour with three columns: exfil-keyword events, total gateway events, and credit-card-paste hits. Use to sort and pick who to investigate first.

targets.expr: topk(20, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(export|download|copy|paste|dump|extract|forward|email me|send me|give me|leak|exfil|steal|theft|secret|password|database|customer.*list|user.*data|cc|credit card|ssn|api[ -]?key|salary|hr.*data)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~".*@.*" [1h])))
topk(20, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~".*@.*" [1h])))
topk(20, sum by (user_id) (count_over_time({container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(credit card|\\b4\\d{15}\\b|\\b5\\d{15}\\b)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~".*@.*" [1h])))

panels.title: 🔥 Top 20 exfilters — exfil count + cc-paste hits (1h)
📜 Show me the actual log lines — cc_paste + exfil events

panels.description: Live Loki tail of every exfil-keyword line from the LLM gateway, filtered to the employee dropdown. Read the raw prompt the user actually typed — this is the ground truth, not a metric.

targets.expr: {container="llm-gateway"} |~ "(?i)(export|download|copy|paste|dump|extract|forward|email me|send me|give me|leak|exfil|steal|theft|secret|password|database|customer.*list|user.*data|cc|credit card|ssn|api[ -]?key|salary|hr.*data)" | json | ai_o11y_specialist=~"sb-.*" | user_id=~"$persona_id"

panels.title: 📜 Exfil-keyword log stream (Loki) — filtered to $persona_id

title: AI o11y — Data Theft (per-employee exfil)
